---
name: Curriculum Gap Request
about: Suggest a missing lesson or curriculum improvement

labels: content-missing
assignees: ''

---

## Lesson Proposal

**Section**: [e.g., "§08 Modules & Packages"]  
**Where it fits**: [e.g., "After MP.2 Managing Dependencies"]  
**Proposed lesson ID**: [e.g., "MP.4"]

## Description

What concept or topic should be taught?

## Learning Objectives

What should learners understand after this lesson?
- [ ] Objective 1
- [ ] Objective 2
- [ ] Objective 3

## Why This Is Important

Why should this be in the curriculum? What production problems does it solve?

## Related Lessons

Which existing lessons are prerequisites?
- [Lesson ID](path/to/lesson): Brief description

Which lessons depend on this?
- [Lesson ID](path/to/lesson): Brief description

## Proposed Content

Outline of what should be covered:
1. Basic concept
2. Common patterns
3. Advanced usage
4. Common mistakes

## Example Problem It Solves

Provide a real-world scenario where this would be helpful.

---

**Note**: Your suggestion will be reviewed and prioritized by maintainers. Thank you for helping improve The Go Engineer!
